items.title: HOVERAir AQUA Now Shipping Globally – 100% Waterproof, 4K 100fps, Self-Flying Tracking on Water
items.summary: HOVERAir has moved its water-native self-flying camera from crowdfunding into full retail, with the HOVERAir AQUA now available globally from $1,299. The 249g, IP67-rated flyer takes off and lands dir…

items.title: DJI Drone Security Audit Finds No Backdoors or Data Leaving the US – Its Case Against the FCC Ban
items.summary: DJI has released the findings of an independent security assessment of two of its drone systems, the DJI Air 3S and the Matrice 4E, conducted by US cybersecurity firm OnDefend. The audit reports zero…

items.title: Capture One’s Private Equity Owner Is Trying to Sell It: Report
items.summary: Reports suggest that Axcel, the Nordic private equity firm that has owned Capture One since 2019, is working to sell the photography software company via auction. [Read More]
